summary.key_theme: 市場對 AI 資本支出激增的擔憂，疊加參議院針對中國影響力的調查與監管壓力，導致財報公布前股價承壓。

bullish.title: Amazon (AMZN) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
bullish.reason: 分析指出 Amazon 具備獲利超預期的潛力，市場對其核心業務成長仍抱持正面期待。

bullish.title: Alphabet Just Tied Amazon’s $200 Billion Capex Guidance. Could Amazon Raise the Bar Even Higher on July 30?
bullish.reason: 強調 CEO Andy Jassy 對 AI 領域的領導決心，市場預期公司將持續擴大 AI 投資以鞏固競爭優勢。

bullish.title: A Mag 7 Peer Just Directed The Market to Load Up on Amazon Before July 30
bullish.reason: 基於同業雲端業務的強勁表現，推論 Amazon 財報亦將受惠，提供買入訊號。

bearish.title: Amazon Falls 4% as Senate China Probe and AI-Spending Jitters Weigh Ahead of Earnings
bearish.reason: 涵蓋了參議院針對中國影響力的調查、AI 支出擔憂及裁員消息，是導致股價下跌的主要綜合性利空因素。

bearish.title: Amazon Stock Slips Below Key Level As Google Sets Tone For Hefty AI Spending
bearish.reason: Google 的財報引發市場對科技巨頭 AI 資本支出過高、獲利能力受損的恐慌，導致 Amazon 股價跌破 200 日均線技術支撐。

bearish.title: Amazon Trims Its Artificial General Intelligence Team. Think of It as a Reset, Not a Pullback.
bearish.reason: 儘管公司稱是資源重組，但裁員行為仍引發市場對 AI 研發進度與成本控制的疑慮。

bearish.title: How to claim part of the historic $2.5 billion Amazon Prime settlement and cancel unwanted subscriptions
bearish.reason: 涉及 25 億美元的 FTC 和解案，對公司商譽及財務現金流造成負面影響。

bearish.title: Greg Abel Makes Bold Portfolio Moves as Berkshire's New Leader -- Dumps Amazon While Buying an Airline Stock
bearish.reason: Berkshire Hathaway 減持 Amazon 股份，可能對機構投資人信心產生負面心理影響。

bearish.title: Walmart shares its quiet plan to take down Amazon
bearish.reason: 競爭對手 Walmart 持續強化物流與 Prime 競爭力，對 Amazon 的電商市占率構成長期威脅。

neutral.title: Amazon and Microsoft pivot cloud gaming strategies to target different players
neutral.reason: 屬於正常的業務策略調整，對短期股價影響有限。

neutral.title: Amazon vs. Microsoft: Which Cloud Empire Is the Better Buy Now?
neutral.reason: 僅為投資比較分析，無實質營運變動。

neutral.title: Google, Amazon, Meta, & Microsoft will spend 'unprecedented' $1T on AI capex in 2027: Analyst
neutral.reason: 分析師對產業趨勢的預測，屬於長期展望，對當前股價影響中性。

neutral.title: Amazon, Walmart, & cautious consumers are major headwinds for Albertson's
neutral.reason: 討論對手 Albertson's 的困境，間接反映 Amazon 在零售市場的強勢地位。

neutral.title: Russia’s Amazon-style retail giant Wildberries is now in Ukraine’s crosshairs
neutral.reason: 與 Amazon 本身無直接關聯，僅為名稱相似的俄羅斯企業新聞。
